sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4121" key="a)lhto/s1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλητός</orth> (A), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀλετός, εἰς ἀ. ἐπράθη</foreign> was sold <sense id="n4121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to grind</tr_> in the mill, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:29:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
